name: pring
description: Google-owned Japanese money-transfer wallet — API for instant bank-linked peer-to-peer and corporate disbursements.

seo.title: pring — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: pring: Google-owned Japanese money-transfer wallet — API for instant bank-linked peer-to-peer and corporate disbursements.

when_to_use: Instant P2P transfers via Google-backed Japanese wallet API
Corporate disbursements via bank-linked pring wallet

review.verdict: Niche Japanese disbursement rail backed by Google, useful for payouts but not mainstream checkout.
review.best_for: Japanese platforms needing bank-linked payouts and corporate disbursements
review.not_for: Merchants needing consumer checkout acceptance at scale in Japan
